test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient for scoped acceptance criteria: the tactical runner now includes and registers FTacticalCombatReportTest, FTacticalDamageSummaryGUITest, and WXTacticalUIAdapterTest, and a verification run executed 131 tests with the newly enabled suites active.
documentation_accuracy_summary: AGENTS.md now distinguishes the pre-fix compiled-but-unregistered state from the post-fix registered/executed state and notes that enabling the suites can expose downstream fixture/source expectation failures.
